name: Tomasz Wierzbicki
summary: Supply chain and operations manager with 9 years of experience across automotive and industrial manufacturing sectors. Proven track record in lean transformation, vendor consolidation, and cross-border logistics.

experience.title: Logistics Coordinator
bullets: Coordinated inbound freight for 3 production lines, managing relationships with 18 logistics providers across Poland and Germany.
Reduced average delivery lead time from 6.2 days to 4.1 days by renegotiating carrier SLAs.
Implemented a daily shipment tracking dashboard in Excel used by a team of 8.

experience.title: Operations Supervisor
bullets: Supervised a floor team of 22 across two shifts, overseeing production output of 11,000 units/month.
Led a Kaizen initiative that reduced material waste by 14% and saved PLN 380,000 annually.
Promoted ISO 9001 compliance across the department, achieving zero non-conformances in 2019 audit.

experience.title: Supply Chain Manager
bullets: Managing end-to-end supply chain for a product portfolio of 340 SKUs across EU and MENA markets.
Consolidated vendor base from 67 to 41 suppliers, achieving 8% reduction in procurement costs (€1.1M savings in FY2022).
Deployed SAP S/4HANA across 2 facilities, cutting monthly close cycle from 9 days to 5.
Built and mentored a team of 6 procurement analysts, 2 of whom were promoted within 18 months.

education.degree: MSc Logistics and Supply Chain Management

achievements: Six Sigma Green Belt certified — BSI Group, 2019
Speaker at LogisTech Poland 2022 Conference on nearshoring supply chain resilience
